target: 51. Unexpected Person
Shinpei Ajiro
*Pant, pant*… *pant*…!! We… somehow… managed to escape…!!
*Pant, pant*…! Yeah…
B-But what is this… place? The scenery is getting weird again…
Yeah, look… this is impossible! There's coral stuck to the rocks! Why are marine creatures living on land…!?
They're Shadows...
This coral... the sea anemones and barnacles too... They're all Shadows...!!
W-Who on earth would do this!?
I don't know... But someone printed the sea here...
(Printing the sea... What a ridiculous scale...)
The water pooled up here is...
It tastes salty... it's seawater. Just as I thought, this cave must be connected to the sea somewhere.
If there's another exit, that'd be good news.
But going any further is dangerous, Shinpei. We used up all the bug spray too. If we get attacked again, we're done for...
*Pant, pant*... Ugh...
Your arm? It was hurting earlier too, right...?
The right arm that Shadow Mio got, it hasn't healed yet, has it?
Yeah... I could print the outward appearance, but it's not really healed...
This is damage... to my main body... It's like data corruption...
To fix my right arm—the corrupted data, I have to scan the real one again...
But the real Ushio is already…
...Yeah, the real Ushio turned to ash. So there's no way... to heal this wound...
A-Are you serious......
All this time...? Ever since you were hit by Mio yesterday... Have you been enduring it this whole time!?
I wasn't sure until just now.
I didn't want to worry you, so I just fixed the appearance... But I guess you found out...
Why didn't you say anything!! Something that important!!
Sorry... I'll just erase my right arm for now... The pain will go away if I do that—
(There's no way to heal it!? That's ridiculous!!!)
(She's getting weaker and weaker... If we leave it like this, Ushio will...!!)
(Damn it!! I won't let her die a second time!!!)
(Should I loop? If I rewind time, will the wound heal!?)
(But… how…?)
Sou, that backpack... What else is in there? Can you wrap something around Ushio's arm...?
Yeah! I brought some disinfectant and bandages just in case! Leave the first aid to me!
Don't move.
developer_comments: 女の子の声（菱形朱鷺子）

target: Slowly turn around. Both of you... if you make the slightest funny move, Ushio-san's life is over.

target: Wh... Why... Why are you... here...!?
Tokiko!!!
